title: alternate ending credits to EoE
wikitext:
[]: alternate ending credits to EoE             Quote Post by shito » Wed Jan 30, 2008 10:35 am how many versions exist of it? pre-Renewal anyway. I have seen the genesis 13 and 14 version, with the preview for ep. 26' after Air, and besides the ending credits of Air it also had credits for Magokoro wo, kimi ni. Then I got the R2 DVD version of The End and the credit screen for Air was different (the spiraled red one) and there was not any credits for 26'. I believe in other bootleg VHS I have it also have both ending credits but not preview for ep. 26'. Maybe the theatrical version of it in LD had both credit endings but not preview for 26'.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Wed Jan 30, 2008 11:12 am EoE video version vs. EoE theatrical version. The first one has ending credits at the end of the movie with snow falling and Jesus bleibet strings version.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Wed Jan 30, 2008 1:09 pm question: what is the name of the song that plays at the end of "Rebirth" when the Eva series gets deployed and the credits start rolling?

[]:             Quote Post by eva unit 04 » Wed Jan 30, 2008 1:32 pm the song you're after is "tamashi no rufuran" i think thats how it's spelt

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Wed Jan 30, 2008 6:28 pm Indeed. Personally my favourite Eva song: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=e5eR9_9-5IA This looks rather official. Anyone prepared to do a translation of the blurb?

[]:             Quote Post by eva unit 04 » Sat Feb 02, 2008 3:11 pm i ran a translator over the blurb and it looks like it's the lyrics, which can be found in both english and Japanese here: http://www.animelyrics.com/anime/eva/ngetnr.htm

[]: Re: alternate ending credits to EoE             Quote Post by flatulant » Sat Feb 02, 2008 4:00 pm shito wrote: preview for ep. 26' after Air

[]:             Quote Post by shito » Sat Feb 02, 2008 9:49 pm I only had it in a crappy quality VHS, which I don't have anymore. Anyway it was only a camera running inside the gainax studio, like in kare kano.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Feb 04, 2008 8:22 am shito wrote: I only had it in a crappy quality VHS, which I don't have anymore. Anyway it was only a camera running inside the gainax studio, like in kare kano.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Feb 04, 2008 1:30 pm I have the Preview to the 26' Video Version somewhere on my HD if you'd really want me to upload it/PM you. (I got it off some site...Now if only I could have the 25' Video Version Preview that's shown after DC24'....)

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Feb 04, 2008 2:05 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: I have the Preview to the 26' Video Version somewhere on my HD if you'd really want me to upload it/PM you. (I got it off some site...Now if only I could have the 25' Video Version Preview that's shown after DC24'....)

Article: alternate ending credits to EoE
[]: alternate ending credits to EoE             Quote Post by shito » Wed Jan 30, 2008 10:35 am how many versions exist of it? pre-Renewal anyway. I have seen the genesis 13 and 14 version, with the preview for ep. 26' after Air, and besides the ending credits of Air it also had credits for Magokoro wo, kimi ni. Then I got the R2 DVD version of The End and the credit screen for Air was different (the spiraled red one) and there was not any credits for 26'. I believe in other bootleg VHS I have it also have both ending credits but not preview for ep. 26'. Maybe the theatrical version of it in LD had both credit endings but not preview for 26'.
